issue.title: GlobalTools.* - Missing objects (AdGuard Tracking Protection filter)

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [X] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [X] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [X] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [X] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [X] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

uBlock Origin v1.50.0

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

other (specify in comment below)

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?
```
https://www.globaltools.dk/
https://www.globaltools.no/
https://www.globaltools.se/
```

* Example:
`https://www.globaltools.no/verktoy/ror-og-vvs-vaerktoj-8817/inspektions-og-lokalisering-8857/`

### What filters do you have enabled?

* **AdGuard Tracking Protection filter**

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

### Affected sites:
```
https://www.globaltools.dk/
https://www.globaltools.no/
https://www.globaltools.se/
```

### Issue:
Missing objects.

### Example:
`https://www.globaltools.no/verktoy/ror-og-vvs-vaerktoj-8817/inspektions-og-lokalisering-8857/`

### Screenshot:
Not needed, as the problem is obvious.

### Problem filter:
* **AdGuard Tracking Protection filter**

### Problem rule:
`||cdn.clerk.io/clerk.js
`
### Possible fix:
`@@||cdn.clerk.io/clerk.js$domain=globaltools.dk|globaltools.no|globaltools.se`

--

### System info:
* OS/version: Windows 10 Pro 22H2 (x64)
* Browser/version: LibreWolf v115.0.2-2 (x64) [Tracking Protection = Standard]
* Adblock Extension/version: uBlock Origin v1.50.0

### Privacy

- [X] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body: Yes, I have added a rule to unblock it and removed previous rule because it looks like that `cdn.clerk.io/clerk.js` is not used anymore.

issue.title: bild.de

labels.name: A: By Design
labels.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

comment.body:
These rules should work:
```adblock
bild.de#%#//scriptlet('json-prune', 'CLIENT_STORE_INITIAL_STATE.pageAggregation.advertisement.adBlockWallEnabled')
||html-load.com^$script,important,domain=bild.de
bild.de#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'HTMLScriptElement.prototype.setAttribute', '1', 'replace:/.+(error-report|new Promise|:window|&&window,|\|\|window,|void 0\]|\)\.join\(String\.fromCharCode|html-load\.com[\s\S]*_onerror).+//g')
bild.de$$script[src="html-load.com/"]
bild.de$$script:contains(/async[\s]*\(\)[\s]*=>[\s]*\{[\s]*try[\s]*\{[\s]*(const|var)[\s]*e[\s]*=[\s]*e[\s]*=>|if[\s]*\(await eval\(|[a-z]\([a-z]\),setTimeout\(\(\(\)=>\{[a-z]\(!1\)|\(async\(\)=>[\s\S]*?\(\)=>eval\)?,.:|\(async \(\) =>[\s\S]*?\(\) => eval\)?,\n.*.:|:\(\)=>eval|;\(async\(\)=>\{\([\s\S]*?:void 0\|\|window,|;\(async\(\)=>\{\([\s\S]*?:\d&&window,|\(function\(\)\{function[\s\S]*]===undefined\)\{var[\s\S]*:-0x|\.adshield\.|;\(async\(\)=>\{\([\s\S]*?,..?:('|")|\.join\(String\.fromCharCode.*?\(async\(\)=>\{var/)
```
At least in apps (Android, Mac, Windows) and extensions, but I didn't test on iOS.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
